nodes.body: The banner text has a typo/formatting issue: `reviews./review_gates. schema` reads like two sentence fragments. Consider changing this to the actual keys (`reviews.*` / `review_gates.*`) and remove the stray periods so it matches the terminology used elsewhere in the repo.
The numbered list has duplicate item numbers: both LRN-133 and “Drain pre-CS35b backlog” are numbered `4.`. Please renumber the subsequent items to keep the priority list unambiguous.

LRN-136 references non-existent/outdated paths and slightly misstates the enforcement point: there is no `scripts/check-review-log-evidence.mjs` (the gate script is `scripts/checks/check-review-log-evidence.mjs`), and there is no `tests/check-review-log-evidence.test.mjs` today. Updating these references will prevent the follow-up CS from chasing the wrong files; also consider clarifying that the current checker normalizes the model and compares to the primary reviewer model (+ fallback rationale), rather than comparing to a configured reviewer-model identifier.

D54-3 says “only normalised bare ids should match the model audit independence check”, but the current independence-invariant logic intentionally normalizes display names (e.g. "Claude Opus 4.7" → `claude-opus-4.7`) for comparisons. If the intent is just “Review log Model column must be a bare id”, consider rewording this so it doesn’t imply changing the model-audit/independence normalization behavior.

These deliverables point the LRN-136 enforcement/test at `scripts/check-review-evidence.mjs` + `tests/check-review-evidence.test.mjs`, but `check-review-evidence.mjs` currently doesn’t validate the Review log `model` cell at all (it only checks required columns + timestamps + analyzed_head currency). The “decorated model id” failure mode is enforced in the PR-side gates under `scripts/checks/check-review-log-evidence.mjs` (and model normalization is also used by `scripts/checks/check-independence-invariant.mjs`). Suggest updating the plan to target the correct gate script(s) and add/extend tests accordingly.
